description: Kit-managed suggested routines. The kit SUGGESTS; the user accepts; nothing is created without opt-in. Each entry maps to one OS cron job (crontab) scoped to the project path.

routines.name: Morning briefing
routines.description: Runs /morning-briefing at the start of the work day — open issues, board state, next actions.

routines.name: Board sweep
routines.description: Scans for orphan issues (no project card), stale In-Progress, and merged PRs whose issue was not closed. Reports drift.

routines.name: Repo GC
routines.description: Prunes merged worktrees and branches (dry-run only — reports what would be cleaned, never auto-deletes).

routines.name: Knowledge lint
routines.description: Validates knowledge/ frontmatter, INDEX completeness, and live references. Reports broken docs.

routines.name: Kit wire check
routines.description: Verifies the kit wiring is up to date (statusline shim, hook permissions, cron entries). Self-heals on drift.

routines.name: Security sweep
routines.description: Runs a dependency CVE scan (npm audit / pip-audit / cargo audit) and reports new high/critical findings.
